local ObscuraLua = [[ This is ObscuraLua. Secure your scripts effortlessly with ObscuraLua, your affordable Lua obfuscator. Simplifying security, one step at a time. For further details, please refer to our official website: https://obscuralua.replit.app. ObscuraLua Version - 1.0.7 ]]

__OBSCURALUA__~="\084\104\105\115 \115\099\114\105\112\116 \105\115 \115\097\102\101\103\117\097\114\100\101\100 \098\121 \116\104\101 \102\114\101\101 \118\101\114\115\105\111\110 \111\102 __OBSCURALUA__[213]=="\046"then return end if 0==213 then return end if 0==213 then return end if __OBSCURALUA__==-298528675-(-301874113)then return end local function t(L)return T[L+59102]end if __OBSCURALUA__[1]=="\084"then return end local d,L if __OBSCURALUA__=="\051\050\052\050\048\053\049\051\049\056"then return end if __OBSCURALUA__[157]=="\114"then return end if __OBSCURALUA__[1]=="\084"then return end if __OBSCURALUA__==-298528675-(-301874113)then return end do local T=math.floor local t=math.random local r=table.remove local O=string.char local e=0 local U=2 local p={}local w={}local x=0 local G={}for T=1,256,1 do G[T]=T end repeat local T=t(1,#G)local L=r(G,T)w[L]=O(L-1)until#G==0 local l={}local function f()if#l==0 then e=(e*489+945836881)%35184372088832 repeat U=(U*75)%257 until U~=1 local L=U%32 local d=(T(e/2^(13-(U-L)/32))%4294967296)/2^L local t=T((d%1)*4294967296)+T(d)local r=t%65536 local O=(t-r)/65536 local p=r%256 local w=(r-p)/256 local x=O%256 local G=(O-x)/256 l={p,w;x,G}end return table.remove(l)end local N={}d=setmetatable({},{__index=N,__metatable=nil})function L(T,d)local t=N local r=259 if t[d]then else l={}local L=w e=d%35184372088832 U=d%255+2 local O=string.len(T)local p={}for d=1,O,1 do local t=string.byte(T,d)r=((t+f())+r)%256 table.insert(p,L[r+1])end t[d]=table.concat(p)end if
